ab: lawkah su’! nanuwan ku babinasun su’?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: pabaynay ci cu tarunaw.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: lawkah su’! pabaynay su’ cu nanuwan?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: pabaynay ci cu qutux a qabubing.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: pabaynay ci cu tarunaw, matbaynay cimu quw?
ch: B+:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: B: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: kiya ga, piya’ babinasn su’?
en: A: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: matibaay cimu cu pinnong quw?
en: B: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: ukas, ini’ cami patibaay cu pinnong.
en: A: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: pabaynay ci cu buwax.
en: B: I want to buy rice.

ab: piya’ cu cabu’ ku babinasun su’?
en: A: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: ami cu tugal cabu’.
en: B: Give me a three pack.

ab: pabaynay ci cu bunga’.
en: B: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: giqarun i matbaynay ku bunga’ la.
en: A: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: pabanay ci cu usayng tahusan papkarangi’.
en: B: I want to buy two bottles of cooking oil.

ab: qutux nanak tahusan ku tha nha’ na bininasan.
en: A: We only have one bottle left.

ab: saani ci mabaynay cu batu’.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: piya’ tintin ku babinasun su’?
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: piya’ tintin ku batu’ ka babinasun su’?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: pabaynay ci cu usayng tintin.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: pabaynay ci cu usayng bhul a nigi’.
en: B: I want to buy two onions.

ab: tugal cu bhul nanak ku kiya la, biyanay mi su’ kahabaag la.
en: A: There are three left, you can have them all!

ab: piya’ pila’ ku qutux cabu’ ka buwax kahani?
en: B: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: usayng kabhul qutux cabu’.
en: A:$200 for a pack.

ab: mapusal cu quwn pila’ kahabaag, hanuan i mapusal pila’ la.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: mahuway su’!
en: B:Thank you!

ab: mamaqisu’ kinamlapgan cu imagal pila’ kahabaag i runi.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: tuwangay mu tikay lawwiy, siqunaw ta’ cu kabhul pila’.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: imagal kabhul magalpuw pila’ kahabaag.
en: A:All $510.

ab: asi mu bayqiy cu imagal kabhul pila’ quw?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: mamati’ cuqaang ku hani la, pakbalayq i mahnuk tikay quw?
ch: B+:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: B: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: aqeh yo! anaga mahnuk cubalay ku hani lga.
ch: A:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: A: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: alaw mu ku pingkan kahani.
en: B: I want this bag of cookies.

ab: matul pila’ ku pingkan kahani, paagal si cu ruma’ ka qaraqarax na’ quw?
ch: A:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: A: The cookies are $30, anything else you need?
